meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup for AI MVP Ideas
content.seo_description: Learn to use Claude Code and Antigravity to pivot from having no project ideas to shipping a revenue-ready SaaS MVP. Expert guide for intermediate builders.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for inspiration. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you can automate market research, rapid prototyping, and architecture design. This workflow transforms abstract business pain points into executable codebases, allowing you to validate and ship your SaaS MVP in hours rather than weeks of aimless ideation.
content.intro:
You stare at the blinking cursor, the weight of a thousand potential SaaS ideas paralyzing your progress. The 'no project idea' trap isn't a lack of creativity; it's a lack of a systematic feedback loop. You aren't just building software; you are architecting a business that needs to survive in the wild, and hesitation is the enemy of your bottom line.

Today, we break that stagnation. By leveraging Claude Code’s reasoning engine alongside the structural power of Antigravity, we shift from 'thinking about building' to 'building the thinking.' This isn't just about writing code; it's about deploying a high-velocity development machine that turns market signals into profitable infrastructure.

steps.title: Analyze Market Gaps
steps.description: Use AI to scan current industry trends and identify high-value problems that need solving.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a SaaS architect. Analyze the current state of productivity tools and identify three high-value, underserved niches suitable for a lean MVP. Provide a problem-solution fit for each.

steps.title: Define MVP Scope
steps.description: Narrow down the selected niche into a minimum viable feature set that delivers instant value.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Take the chosen niche and define a 48-hour MVP scope. List the core features required for a paid beta, excluding all non-essential 'nice-to-haves'.

steps.title: Bootstrap Architecture
steps.description: Generate the project structure and boilerplate code using Claude Code to ensure scalability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust, production-ready directory structure for a Next.js SaaS MVP. Include essential middleware for auth, database connections, and Stripe integration.

steps.title: Implement Core Logic
steps.description: Feed the business requirements into Claude Code to scaffold the primary user-facing features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the core business logic module for the MVP. Focus on clean code principles, modularity, and error handling for the primary user flow.

steps.title: Validate and Deploy
steps.description: Run automated testing and prepare the build for initial deployment to a cloud provider.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a test suite for the core logic and provide a deployment script optimized for Vercel/Railway.

pro_tips: Always force Claude Code to generate unit tests before implementation; it reduces debugging time by 70%.
Use Antigravity to maintain a 'Context Document' that Claude Code references, ensuring consistency across large codebases.
Never build features without a corresponding database schema definition provided to the AI first.
Leverage Claude Code’s CLI history to create reusable 'macro' scripts for repetitive boilerplate tasks.
Treat your prompt engineering as a codebase: version control your prompts in a /prompts folder for consistency.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, immediately set up a feedback loop by integrating a simple telemetry tool to monitor which features users actually click on, then iterate using the same Claude Code pipeline.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to turn any spark of an idea into a functional, revenue-generating SaaS. Don't let your code sit on a local drive—ship it, sell it, and iterate. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
